infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: E-Claw needs camera access to send photos to your entities.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: E-Claw needs photo library access to send images to your entities.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: E-Claw needs microphone access to record voice messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: E-Claw saves media files to your photo library.
